managedblockchain.member.votingpolicy.Cf:
The voting rules for the network to decide if a proposal is accepted 

Applies only to Hyperledger Fabric.

managedblockchain.member.votingpolicy.Ap.Description: Defines the rules for the network for voting on proposals, such as the percentage of `YES` votes required for the proposal to be approved and the duration of the proposal. The policy applies to all proposals and is specified when the network is created.
